zh.Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wallace 6th Riccarton於1307年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾爾德斯利時，他的父親Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie34歲，母親Margaret Mary Almour29歲。他於1330年與Lady Margaret de Lindsay Countess of Craigie在蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1377年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉享年70歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wallace 6th Riccarton于1307年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾艾爾德斯利时，他的父亲Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie34岁，母亲Margaret Mary Almour29岁。他于1330年与Lady Margaret de Lindsay Countess of Craigie在苏格兰艾斯爾可萊吉结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1377年在苏格兰艾斯爾可萊吉享年70岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾可萊吉。

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Wallace 6th Riccarton was born in 1307, in Elderslie, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie, was 34 and his mother, Margaret Mary Almour, was 29. He married Lady Margaret de Lindsay Countess of Craigie in 1330, in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1377, in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 70, and was buried in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wallace 6th Riccarton est né en 1307, à Elderslie, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mary Almour, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret de Lindsay Countess of Craigie en 1330, à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1377, à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wallace 6th Riccarton 1307 in Elderslie, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie 34 und seine Mutter Margaret Mary Almour 29. Er hat 1330 in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland Lady Margaret de Lindsay Countess of Craigie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1377 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wallace 6th Riccarton è nato il nel 1307 nel Elderslie, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Mary Almour, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret de Lindsay Countess of Craigie nel 1330, nel Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1377, nel Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wallace 6th Riccartonが1307年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエルダースリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslieは34歳，母Margaret Mary Almourは29歳であった。1330年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジでLady Margaret de Lindsay Countess of Craigieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1377年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジで70歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wallace 6th Riccarton(이)가 1307년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 엘더슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Mary Almour(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1330년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에서 Lady Margaret de Lindsay Countess of Craigie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1377년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wallace 6th Riccarton nasceu em 1307, em Elderslie, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mary Almour, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret de Lindsay Countess of Craigie em 1330, em Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1377, em Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wallace 6th Riccarton родился в 1307 г. в местности элдирсли, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mary Almour, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret de Lindsay Countess of Craigie в 1330 г. в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1377 г. в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Wallace 6th Riccarton nació en 1307, en Elderslie, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret Mary Almour, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret de Lindsay Countess of Craigie en 1330, en Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1377, en Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.
